Off Calendar Mar-16-2020 Continued To Mar-30-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jan-29-2020 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jan-15-2020 Continued To Jan-29-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: David Simon for Petitioner.

Mr. Simon stated that one week ago he e-filed the petition for termination and discharge based on no assets, that File & Serve messed up and that they re-filed the petition yesterday. The Court noted that the petition is still pending in the e-file que. Status on close of estate is continued to January 29, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Counsel is to make sure that it is done and that the petition does not get rejected.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: J. Lelu. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Dec-18-2019 Continued To Jan-15-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: David Simons appeared by telephone for (Petitioner).

Mr. Simon stated that there are no assets, that he will file a petition for termination of the estate, that the petition has been sent out to his Client and that a Junior Associate filed a dismissal in error instead of a petition to terminate. Status on close of estate is continued to January 15, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.
